headline: Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) Stock Is Up, What You Need To Know
summary: Shares of electronic design automation company Cadence Design Systems (NASDAQ:CDNS) jumped 3.7% in the afternoon session after the tech-heavy Nasdaq surged in response to the de-escalation of the U.S.-Iran conflict.
